about.en: Gemini is a centralized cryptocurrency exchange and custodian serving retail and institutional users. It focuses on regulated digital-asset trading and custody services.
about.es: Gemini es un exchange y custodio centralizado de criptomonedas para usuarios retail e institucionales. Se centra en trading y custodia regulada de activos digitales.
about.ca: Gemini es un exchange i custodi centralitzat de criptomonedes per a usuaris retail i institucionals. Se centra en trading i custodia regulada d'actius digitals.
